languages.text: 大軍勢に、死は破滅の力に仕えるよりましだと説明した。
languages.original_text: Explained to the Arch-Militant that death is better than serving the Ruinous Powers.

traits.locale_text: 大軍勢に、死は破滅の力に仕えるよりましだと説明した。

languages.text: 向首席战士解释称，宁可一死，也不要侍奉毁灭之力。
languages.original_text: Explained to the Arch-Militant that death is better than serving the Ruinous Powers.

traits.locale_text: 向首席战士解释称，宁可一死，也不要侍奉毁灭之力。

languages.text: Başmilitan'a, ölümün Yıkıcı Güçler'e hizmet etmekten daha iyi olduğunu açıkladın.
languages.original_text: Explained to the Arch-Militant that death is better than serving the Ruinous Powers.

traits.locale_text: Başmilitan'a, ölümün Yıkıcı Güçler'e hizmet etmekten daha iyi olduğunu açıkladın.

languages.text: Le explicaste a tu Archimilitante que morir es preferible a servir a los Poderes Ruinosos.
languages.original_text: Explained to the Arch-Militant that death is better than serving the Ruinous Powers.

traits.locale_text: Le explicaste a tu Archimilitante que morir es preferible a servir a los Poderes Ruinosos.

languages.text: Vous avez expliqué à l'archimilitant que la mort était préférable au service des Puissances de la Ruine.
languages.original_text: Explained to the Arch-Militant that death is better than serving the Ruinous Powers.

traits.locale_text: Vous avez expliqué à l'archimilitant que la mort était préférable au service des Puissances de la Ruine.

languages.text: Dem Erzmilitanten erklärt, dass es besser ist, zu sterben, als den Mächten der Zerstörung zu dienen.
